secondary.description: Vibrant Lime - Creator Energy, Action, ROI

spacing_system.rule: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. Containers with borders must have p-6 or p-8.

mode_a_tetris.rules: Asymmetry is key. Never fill 100% perfectly.

mode_b_density.rules: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5

cards.style: rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-border/40 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating controls, toast notifications

tracing_beam.description: Animated gradient border for high-value cards (Pricing, Top Creators)
tracing_beam.implementation: Use framer-motion to animate a div tracing the SVG path of the border.

noise_texture.usage: Subtle background overlay to kill digital flatness
noise_texture.css: background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");

hero_creator.alt: Professional creator filming with studio lighting

business_meeting.alt: Creative team collaborating in modern office

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 or w-6 h-6).

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts, no default Tailwind blue.
Dark colors must be solid, not gradients.
Create depth with z-index and layered shadows.
NO 'text-align: center' on the main App container.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot class-variance-authority sonner` (or yarn equivalent).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the new color palette and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the `Layout` component with the sticky header and footer.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the Landing Page using the 'Tetris Grid' and provided images.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Auth pages (Login/Register) with a split layout (Image + Form).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Build the Dashboards using the 'Density Grid'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA/WCAG AA).
